$schema_comment: Maxim Usage-Aware Scheduler Thresholds. v1.0.0+. Pinned globally — usage is a global pool across all Claude surfaces (claude.ai, Claude Code CLI, IDE extensions). When any threshold is exceeded, scheduled tasks sleep until resets_at.

thresholds._five_hour_pause_at_comment: Pause scheduled tasks when the 5-hour rolling session utilization >= this percent. The 5-hour window starts from your first message — always use the API's resets_at value.
thresholds._seven_day_pause_at_comment: Pause when the 7-day all-models utilization >= this percent.
thresholds._seven_day_opus_pause_at_comment: Pause Opus-targeted tasks when 7-day Opus utilization >= this percent. Tasks that don't require Opus continue.

behavior._min_sleep_comment: Never sleep less than 5 minutes regardless of computed value — protects API.
behavior._api_failure_retry_comment: On API failure (401, 5xx, network error), retry after this many seconds.
behavior._no_tasks_due_comment: When all tasks are done or future-scheduled, sleep this long before next cycle.
behavior._task_timeout_comment: Hard timeout per task execution. 10 minutes default.
behavior._fallback_model_comment: When seven_day_opus is paused, route Opus-required tasks to this model. Set to null to defer Opus tasks until reset.
behavior._default_model_comment: Use Sonnet by default to preserve Opus headroom. Tasks can override per-task.

token_source._comment: Where the OAuth token is read from. macOS uses Keychain. Linux/CI uses env var. Windows uses Credential Manager (planned).

presets._comment: Recommended thresholds by Anthropic plan. Override 'thresholds' above to apply.

logging._events_log_comment: Append-only JSONL of scheduler events: cycle_start, threshold_check, sleep, task_run, task_complete, task_fail.
logging._log_usage_snapshots_comment: Snapshot OAuth usage data on every cycle for trend analysis.
